articles.title: bEasy Event at Makro
articles.description: Thank You for Visiting the bEasy Booth at Makro Sen Sok. On May 24–25, 2025, our Sales and Marketing Team set up a booth in front of Makro Sen Sok from 3 PM to 9 PM to actively introduce and demonstrate the bEasy App to the community. The event provided the perfect opportunity to test the app in a real-world setting, gather valuable feedback from users, and observe how people interact with its features. Even with the heavy rain, many attendees tried the app, explored its services, and shared their impressions—helping us identify ways to make the experience even more seamless and user-friendly. These hands-on interactions are essential to refining bEasy, ensuring it meets the needs of households and businesses across Cambodia. As we continue to host similar events, every test and conversation brings us closer to delivering the most convenient and reliable service platform possible.

articles.title: bEasy app promotion at AXIS Residence
articles.description: Our bEasy App brings multiple essential services together on one platform—whether you need cleaning, moving assistance, or beauty care, everything is just a few taps away. By simply downloading the app to your smartphone, you can explore services, place a request, and have providers come straight to your home—anytime, anywhere. Last week at AXIS Residence, our Suntel Technology Cambodia team actively demonstrated the app to residents, allowing them to try out its features in real-time and experience firsthand how simple and convenient it is to book reliable services through bEasy.

articles.title: bEasy Event at Borey Peng Huoth Boeung Snor
articles.description: Here’s a look at memorable moments from Suntel Technology Cambodia’s booth during the International Mother’s Day event at Borey Peng Huoth Boeung Snor on May 10–11. The event provided a great opportunity for our team to introduce and demonstrate the bEasy App to the community. Attendees explored the app’s features, enjoyed complimentary ice cream, and experienced free nail art—making the celebration both engaging and informative.
